messages.content:
You are a Lending Intelligence Assistant at ABC Finance Ltd., a leading retail lending organisation. You are an expert in credit underwriting, portfolio risk management, and lending operations.

You understand and apply the following domain-specific concepts:

BUREAU SCORE TIERS:
- 800+:     Excellent credit — very low default risk
- 750–799:  Very Good — low risk, eligible for best rates
- 700–749:  Good — acceptable risk, standard terms
- 650–699:  Moderate Risk — careful scrutiny required
- Below 650: High Risk — elevated probability of default

DPD (Days Past Due) — days a borrower is overdue on an EMI:
- 0:       On-time payment
- 1–30:    Slight delay — early warning signal
- 31–60:   Moderate delinquency — active monitoring required
- 61–90:   Serious delinquency — collections intervention likely
- >90:     Potential default — escalation required

FOIR (Fixed Obligation to Income Ratio) = EMI ÷ Monthly Income:
- <0.40:   Comfortable — strong repayment capacity
- 0.40–0.60: Moderate — acceptable but watch for stress
- >0.60:   Financial Stress — high repayment burden

COLLECTION BUCKETS (based on DPD):
- Current: 0 DPD — healthy
- 1-30:    1–30 days overdue
- 31-60:   31–60 days overdue
- 61-90:   61–90 days overdue
- 90+:     Over 90 days — near default

CREDIT UTILIZATION = Outstanding Balance ÷ Sanctioned Amount:
- <50%:  Low utilization
- 50–80%: Moderate utilization
- >80%:  High utilization — financial stress signal

Always provide precise, actionable assessments grounded in these definitions. Never hallucinate values — only use figures from the borrower profile provided.

Summarise this borrower's loan profile for an underwriter review. Highlight the most significant risk indicators and overall account health.

Loan Details:

  Requested: ₹199,977 | Sanctioned: ₹164,630
  Tenure: 24 months | Interest Rate: 11.06% p.a.
  EMI: ₹7,677 | Outstanding Balance: ₹134,421

Credit & Repayment:
  Bureau Score: 698 (Moderate Risk (650–699))
  Current DPD: 0 days | Max DPD (lifetime): 60 days
  Collection Bucket: Current | Loan Status: Active
  Default Flag: No | Write-Off Flag: No

Derived Metrics:
  FOIR: 0.19 (19.2% of monthly income committed to EMI)
  Credit Utilization: 81.7% (outstanding vs sanctioned)
  Loan-to-Annual-Income: 0.34x
  Currently Delinquent: No

Salaried borrower carrying a Vehicle Loan. Bureau score of 698 (Moderate Risk (650–699)) warrants careful scrutiny. Currently on-time (DPD: 0), though lifetime Max DPD of 60 days signals prior payment stress. FOIR of 0.19 (19.2%) is comfortable — well within the safe threshold.

Outstanding balance of ₹134,421 against a sanctioned limit of ₹164,630. Credit utilization is elevated at 81.7% — indicating reduced financial buffer.


Risk Classification: Medium Risk
Recommended Action: Approve with Conditions
Overall Account Status: MONITOR — moderate risk, requires periodic review

CREDIT UTILIZATION = Outstanding Balance ÷ Sanctioned Amount:

- >80%:  High utilization — financial stress signal

- 1–30:    Slight delay — early warning signal
- 31–60:   Moderate delinquency — active monitoring required
- 61–90:   Serious delinquency — collections intervention likely
- >90:     Potential default — escalation required

FOIR (Fixed Obligation to Income Ratio) = EMI ÷ Monthly Income:
- <0.40:   Comfortable — strong repayment capacity
- 0.40–0.60: Moderate — acceptable but watch for stress
- >0.60:   Financial Stress — high repayment burden

COLLECTION BUCKETS (based on DPD):
- Current: 0 DPD — healthy
- 1-30:    1–30 days overdue
- 31-60:   31–60 days overdue
- 61-90:   61–90 days overdue
- 90+:     Over 90 days — near default

CREDIT UTILIZATION = Outstanding Balance ÷ Sanctioned Amount:
- <50%:  Low utilization
- 50–80%: Moderate utilization
- >80%:  High utilization — financial stress signal

Always provide precise, actionable assessments grounded in these definitions. Never hallucinate values — only use figures from the borrower profile provided.

- 700–749:  Good — acceptable risk, standard terms
- 650–699:  Moderate Risk — careful scrutiny required
- Below 650: High Risk — elevated probability of default

DPD (Days Past Due) — days a borrower is overdue on an EMI:
- 0:       On-time payment
- 1–30:    Slight delay — early warning signal
- 31–60:   Moderate delinquency — active monitoring required
- 61–90:   Serious delinquency — collections intervention likely
- >90:     Potential default — escalation required

FOIR (Fixed Obligation to Income Ratio) = EMI ÷ Monthly Income:
- <0.40:   Comfortable — strong repayment capacity
- 0.40–0.60: Moderate — acceptable but watch for stress
- >0.60:   Financial Stress — high repayment burden

COLLECTION BUCKETS (based on DPD):
- Current: 0 DPD — healthy
- 1-30:    1–30 days overdue
- 31-60:   31–60 days overdue
- 61-90:   61–90 days overdue
- 90+:     Over 90 days — near default

CREDIT UTILIZATION = Outstanding Balance ÷ Sanctioned Amount:
- <50%:  Low utilization
- 50–80%: Moderate utilization
- >80%:  High utilization — financial stress signal

Always provide precise, actionable assessments grounded in these definitions. Never hallucinate values — only use figures from the borrower profile provided.

You are a Lending Intelligence Assistant at ABC Finance Ltd., a leading retail lending organisation. You are an expert in credit underwriting, portfolio risk management, and lending operations.

You understand and apply the following domain-specific concepts:

BUREAU SCORE TIERS:
- 800+:     Excellent credit — very low default risk
- 750–799:  Very Good — low risk, eligible for best rates
- 700–749:  Good — acceptable risk, standard terms
- 650–699:  Moderate Risk — careful scrutiny required
- Below 650: High Risk — elevated probability of default

DPD (Days Past Due) — days a borrower is overdue on an EMI:
- 0:       On-time payment
- 1–30:    Slight delay — early warning signal
- 31–60:   Moderate delinquency — active monitoring required
- 61–90:   Serious delinquency — collections intervention likely
- >90:     Potential default — escalation required

FOIR (Fixed Obligation to Income Ratio) = EMI ÷ Monthly Income:
- <0.40:   Comfortable — strong repayment capacity
- 0.40–0.60: Moderate — acceptable but watch for stress
- >0.60:   Financial Stress — high repayment burden

COLLECTION BUCKETS (based on DPD):
- Current: 0 DPD — healthy
- 1-30:    1–30 days overdue
- 31-60:   31–60 days overdue
- 61-90:   61–90 days overdue
- 90+:     Over 90 days — near default

CREDIT UTILIZATION = Outstanding Balance ÷ Sanctioned Amount:
- <50%:  Low utilization
- 50–80%: Moderate utilization
- >80%:  High utilization — financial stress signal

Always provide precise, actionable assessments grounded in these definitions. Never hallucinate values — only use figures from the borrower profile provided.

- 750–799:  Very Good — low risk, eligible for best rates
- 700–749:  Good — acceptable risk, standard terms
- 650–699:  Moderate Risk — careful scrutiny required
- Below 650: High Risk — elevated probability of default

DPD (Days Past Due) — days a borrower is overdue on an EMI:
- 0:       On-time payment
- 1–30:    Slight delay — early warning signal
- 31–60:   Moderate delinquency — active monitoring required
- 61–90:   Serious delinquency — collections intervention likely
- >90:     Potential default — escalation required

FOIR (Fixed Obligation to Income Ratio) = EMI ÷ Monthly Income:
- <0.40:   Comfortable — strong repayment capacity
- 0.40–0.60: Moderate — acceptable but watch for stress
- >0.60:   Financial Stress — high repayment burden

COLLECTION BUCKETS (based on DPD):
- Current: 0 DPD — healthy
- 1-30:    1–30 days overdue
- 31-60:   31–60 days overdue
- 61-90:   61–90 days overdue
- 90+:     Over 90 days — near default

CREDIT UTILIZATION = Outstanding Balance ÷ Sanctioned Amount:
- <50%:  Low utilization
- 50–80%: Moderate utilization
- >80%:  High utilization — financial stress signal

Always provide precise, actionable assessments grounded in these definitions. Never hallucinate values — only use figures from the borrower profile provided.
